title: Supply Chain Logistics Optimization
description: End-to-end SQL project analyzing logistics orders, route costs, carrier choices, warehouse constraints, and optimization opportunities.
insights: Analyzed 15,398 logistics orders across plants, carriers, products, and destination ports.
Identified 6,368 overpaying orders and traced 95.3% of savings to one plant.
Used multi-condition route joins, window functions, CTEs, and optimization simulation queries.
